thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content: 目前来看策划是不打算取消+12了，未来游戏会奔着怪物难度越来越高，新角色机制拆分越来越严重，加速老角色淘汰的方向走。这次向还想玩这个游戏的玩家号召：希望在新版本缓氪金少氪金甚至不氪金，用流水表明玩家的态度
thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content: At present, it seems that the planners do not intend to cancel 12. In the future, the game will move in the direction of monsters becoming increasingly difficult, new character systems being split more severely, and the accelerated elimination of old characters. This time, a call to players who still want to play this game: we hope that in the new version, you spend less money, lightly spend, or even do not spend at all, and use the flow to show the players' attitude.
thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content:
From Chinese (Simplified) (ZH_HANS) To English (EN)
> I have had enough of the internal hatred. I never see the role itself. From the perspective of all adjustments and all strengthening, I can't even do the most basic fair treatment.
>  You cat never understood that behind every character there is a group of chefs who truly protect them. We pour our love and energy into our characters, not to see you measure everything by heat. The cat tramples on the player's love freely, completely unconcerned with the chefs' expectations and heartbreak, treats the game as a tool for pure profit, and abandons the most basic original intention of creation and respect for players.
>  Over time, what has been lost is not only the popularity of the character, but also the trust of all sincere players. This kind of profit-seeking will eventually exhaust everyone's patience and make Morimens completely lose its original warmth and meaning!
thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content: 你游早就不配氪金了，氪金前先想想这超绝产能吧，每次剧情都要分割成好几天放送生怕你一两个小时打完剩下的27天全在长草，从超限双持到现在的+12，大月卡是缩成28天的，这次延期两周也要出个就两周的大月卡，新人没有+12金命轮？可以买我们推出的命轮礼包啊，骗氪手段越来越多，但凡有点产能提升呢？反正你给这游戏氪的金的一丁点也不会反馈到产能上嘻嘻👁️
